ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Jan-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall, via Zoom, for Laura Abernathy, Personal Representative.

At the court's query, Ms. Hall reports that a petition for final distribution is with her client for signature and that it will be filed forthwith.

The subject matter is continued to Jan-30-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-04-1995 is admitted to probate. Laura Abernathy is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
